stemHtml:
Consider a multi-engine aeroplane with an MTOW < 5700 kg. The aeroplane is flying at 2000 ft with an engine failed, maintaining maximum power and the minimum control speed (VMC) for this altitude.

If the pilot descends, maintaining the same speed and power setting, the directional control of the aeroplane will be (1) _____, because VMC (2) _____ as altitude decreases.
